current_truth.active_files:
/workspace/src/services/refreshTokenService.ts:

SAMPLE-1234 M6: refresh-token rotation with reuse detection.

Storage: tokenHash (SHA-256(rawToken + pepper)) + sessionId chain.
Rotation: atomic transaction marks old row revoked + inserts new row.
Reuse detection: presenting an already-revoked token invalidates the entire chain (industry-standard rotation pattern).
